prompt_en: The sky changes from deep black to white as dawn breaks.
auxiliary_info: Does the scene change from dark to bright? (yes or no)

prompt_en: A room changes from dark to bright as sunlight enters.
auxiliary_info: Does the room become brighter? (yes or no)

prompt_en: A tree stump changes from small to large as it decays.
auxiliary_info: Does the size of the tree stump increase as it decays? (yes or no)

prompt_en: A sponge changes from small to large as it absorbs water.
auxiliary_info: Does the size of the sponge increase as it absorbs water? (yes or no)

prompt_en: A sculpture changes from large to small as it’s carved.
auxiliary_info: Does the size of the sculpture decrease as it’s carved? (yes or no)

prompt_en: A puddle changes from small to large as rain continues to fall.
auxiliary_info: Does the size of the puddle increase as rain continues to fall? (yes or no)

prompt_en: The glass car window changed into a wooden car window.
auxiliary_info: Initially, is the material of the car window glass? (yes or no)
Finally, is the material of the car window wooden? (yes or no)
Does the material of the car window change? (yes or no)

prompt_en: The plastic water cup turned into a metal water cup.
auxiliary_info: Initially, is the material of the water cup plastic? (yes or no)
Finally, is the material of the water cup metal? (yes or no)
Does the material of the water cup change? (yes or no)

prompt_en: The wooden door handle transformed into a plastic door handle.
auxiliary_info: Initially, is the material of the door handle wooden? (yes or no)
Finally, is the material of the door handle plastic? (yes or no)
Does the material of the door handle change? (yes or no)
